hero.title:
Map the World,
Drive Decisions
hero.description: Dr. Geo delivers cutting-edge geospatial solutions — from satellite imagery analysis to real-time location intelligence — empowering businesses to see further and act smarter.

highlights.title: Why Dr. Geo?
highlights.subtitle: We combine satellite data, machine learning, and decades of domain expertise to turn raw geography into actionable insight.
highlights.card1_desc: Live geospatial data streams updated every minute, keeping your operations always in sync with the ground truth.
highlights.card2_desc: Advanced algorithms detect patterns, anomalies, and trends across vast geographic datasets automatically.
highlights.card3_desc: Full-planet satellite coverage with sub-meter resolution, available on-demand for any region on Earth.
